price: Und, wenn sie sie sahen, sagten sie: Diese gehen fürwahr in die Irre.
arabic: وَإِذَا رَأَوۡهُمۡ قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَضَآلُّونَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: wa-idhā ra-awhum qālū inna hāulāi laḍāllūna
